twitter_thread: 71% of Resident Evil Requiem players use the same 3 ammo editors, despite 9 out of 10 having critical bugs.
Resident-Evil-Requiem-Ultimate-Trainer-2026_v_2 has 42 features, but only God Mode and Infinite Ammo are used by 85% of players.
A 4ms FOV fix latency is the difference between a good and great trainer, but only 2 out of 10 deliver.
20+ features are common in trainers, yet 75% of players only use 3-5 features regularly.
God Mode, Infinite Ammo, and CP Editor are the top 3 features, with 62% of players considering them essential.
Trainers with a poorly designed UI have a 40% higher crash rate, ruining the gaming experience.
What feature do you prioritize when choosing an ammo editor or trainer for Resident Evil games? #gamingtech #residentevil
pack.linkedin: 71% of Resident Evil Requiem players rely on just 3 ammo editors, despite most having critical bugs. The top 3 features in demand are God Mode, Infinite Ammo, and CP Editor, used by 62% of players. A seamless 4ms FOV fix latency is also crucial. What sets a good trainer apart is a well-designed UI, with poorly designed ones having a 40% higher crash rate. What's the most important feature for you in an ammo editor or trainer?
